Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scratching of pencils echoes[n]throughout the art room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's been so fun that the hours flew by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Let's wrap up for today. Good work, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}All right, let's clean up and go home.[n]{f 1 1}
